html:
Exclusive to:

Dead Rainbow Jellyfish is a Fish Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be obtained by murdering Rainbow Jellyfish. It can be dried on a Drying Rack to obtain Dried Jellyfish. It can be used in Crock Pot, and counts for 1 Fish value and 1 Monster value. Eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish will make the character glow and give off colored light similar to that of a Rainbow Jellyfish. This glowing effect becomes visibly weaker as time goes on, and only lasts around 2 minutes.

Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish

Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish is a Fish Food Item made by cooking Dead Rainbow Jellyfish on a Campfire, Fire Pit, Star, Chiminea, or Obsidian Fire Pit. It has the same value in a Crock Pot as the raw counterpart. Unlike its raw counterpart, eating Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish will not make the player glow.

Usage

Tips

  • During mid Dry Season, one can eat Dead Rainbow Jellyfish to stay safe from Charlie during the whole night, as nights are shorter during that Season.
  • Some Mobs, such as Wildbores and Spiders, will also glow after eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.

Trivia

  • Rainbow Jellyfish were added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

Gallery

  • Webber glowing in rainbow colors after eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
  • A Spider glowing after eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“An electric shock will not revive it. I tried.”
–Wilson, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“It's still moving.”
–Willow, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Good looking jelly is no look so good.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Death has come for it.”
–Wendy, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“I LIKE IT BETTER THIS WAY”
–WX-78, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“A deceased Medusozoa.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“I don't think my little buddy's getting up anytime soon.”
–Woodie, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“That one's not getting back up.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“I'm quite convinced eating raw seafood would result in disaster.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Tö swim, tö sting nö möre.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Sorry, fishy.”
–Webber, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Aw.”
–Walani, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“No sense letting it go to waste.”
–Warly, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Tis gon' belly up!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“'TIS DEAD”
–Wilba, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Not poofy anymore”
–Wormwood, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Shiny happy food.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.
Dead Rainbow Jellyfish is a Fish Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be obtained by murdering Rainbow Jellyfish. It can be dried on a Drying Rack to obtain Dried Jellyfish. It can be used in Crock Pot, and counts for 1 Fish value and 1 Monster value. Eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish will make the character glow and give off colored light similar to that of a Rainbow Jellyfish. This glowing effect becomes visibly weaker as time goes on, and only lasts around 2 minutes.

“A colorful snack!”
–Wilson, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“I wonder if the colors add flavor.”
–Willow, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Food is many pretty colors!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Beautiful, even in death.”
–Wendy, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“RAINBOW ROBOT FUEL”
–WX-78, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“A thoroughly cooked Medusozoa specimen.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“As good of eating as anything around here.”
–Woodie, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Done, like dinner.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Wonderful! Its chromatic variations were preserved!”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Ah, a pröper meal!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“I love brightly colored food!”
–Webber, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Aw jeez. It's even cute when it's cooked.”
–Walani, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“You can really taste the "rainbow".”
–Warly, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Now Woodlegs' belly'll soon b'full'o colors!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“FWOOSH'DED PRETTY FISHIES O' SQUISHIES”
–Wilba, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“Pretty rings”
–Wormwood, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.
“What it lost in shine, it gained in palatability.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Cooked Rainbow Jellyfish.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sứa Cầu Vồng Chết là một Thực Phẩm Cá được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó có thể thu được bằng cách giết Sứa Cầu Vồng. Nó có thể được sấy khô trên Giá Phơi để thu được Sứa Khô. Nó có thể được sử dụng trong Nồi Hầm và được tính cho 1 giá trị Cá và 1 giá trị Quái vật. Ăn Sứa Cầu Vồng Chết sẽ khiến nhân vật phát sáng và phát ra ánh sáng màu tương tự như Sứa Cầu Vồng. Hiệu ứng phát sáng này yếu đi rõ rệt theo thời gian và chỉ kéo dài khoảng 2 phút.

'''Dead Rainbow Jellyfish''' is a [[Fishes|Fish]] [[Food]] [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It can be obtained by murdering [[Rainbow Jellyfish]]. It can be dried on a [[Drying Rack]] to obtain [[Dried Jellyfish]]. It can be used in Crock Pot, and counts for 1 [[Fishes|Fish]] value and 1 [[Monster Food|Monster]] value. Eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish will make the character glow and give off colored light similar to that of a Rainbow Jellyfish. This glowing effect becomes visibly weaker as time goes on, and only lasts around 2 minutes.

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
* During mid [[Seasons/Dry|Dry Season]], one can eat Dead Rainbow Jellyfish to stay safe from [[Charlie]] during the whole night, as nights are shorter during that Season.
* Some [[Mobs]], such as [[Wildbore]]s and [[Spider]]s, will also glow after eating a Dead Rainbow Jellyfish.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Rainbow Jellyfish were added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
